mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate declines below 0.5% signal monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases net present value of corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current FEDFUNDS at 0.16% indicates deep accommodation
regime_hint: monetary easing cycle with rates near zero lower bound
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 0.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate above 8% signals labor market slack and economic weakness that depresses corporate earnings expectations and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: post-shock recovery or recession with elevated unemployment
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of instances when UNRATE > 8%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth decelerates below 2% year-over-year while unemployment remains elevated, indicating consumer demand weakness that compresses profit margins and equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current RSAFS at 404596M and UNRATE at 8.2% suggest demand stress
regime_hint: late-cycle slowdown with labor market deterioration
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect (joint condition) shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in logistic regression versus single-variable models.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines month-over-month, signaling supply-side contraction and reduced capacity utilization that constrains earnings growth and equity returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current INDPRO at 97.2853 is below 2017 baseline
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 65% of instances following INDPRO declines, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts decline below 700K annualized units while real GDP growth remains subdued, indicating demand-side weakness in construction and related sectors that reduces forward equity returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current HOUST at 708K near threshold, GDPC1 at 13491.4B
regime_hint: demand-constrained expansion with housing market weakness
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.15) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth decelerates to below 50K new jobs per month while inflation remains elevated, signaling labor market cooling that constrains consumer spending and equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS MoM change < 50K AND CPIAUCSL YoY > 3%
regime_hint: stagflationary environment with labor market deterioration
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the joint condition shows no incremental predictive power (R² increase < 0.02) versus single-variable models.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation measured by CPI remains above 3% year-over-year while federal funds rate stays below 1%, indicating real negative rates that erode purchasing power and signal policy accommodation that supports equity valuations over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:current FEDFUNDS at 0.16% and CPIAUCSL at 228.527
regime_hint: accommodative monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction effect shows no statistical significance (p > 0.12) in explaining forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth remains positive and above 0.3% quarter-over-quarter while housing starts exceed 700K annualized units, indicating sustained demand momentum that supports corporate earnings and equity valuations over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: any regime with positive demand signals
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in more than 55% of all observations, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.
